description:
FeedFlow is a minimalistic RSS Reader available on Android, iOS, macOS, Windows and Linux. Built with Kotlin Multiplatform, Jetpack Compose and SwiftUI.


• Added a confirmation step before deleting a feed.
• Polished toolbar, menus, and drawer for a cleaner desktop interface.
• Refined window and dialog handling across the app.
• Feed customization and opening preferences now apply to search results too.
• Bug fixing and improvements
